CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INTEGER, grapheme_string VARCHAR);
SELECT substring_grapheme(grapheme_string, 1, 2) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT substring_grapheme(grapheme_string, 3, 1) AS substring FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2;
SELECT substring_grapheme(grapheme_string, 1, LENGTH(grapheme_string)) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 3;
SELECT substring_grapheme(grapheme_string, 2, 3) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 4;
SELECT substring_grapheme(grapheme_string, 1, 0) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 4;
SELECT substring_grapheme(grapheme_string, 1, 5) AS result FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1 AND LENGTH(grapheme_string) >= 5;
SELECT t.id, substring_grapheme(t.grapheme_string, 1, 5) AS substring FROM test_strings t JOIN (SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE LENGTH(grapheme_string) < 10) AS subquery ON t.id = subquery.id;
SELECT substring_grapheme(grapheme_string, 3, 2) FROM (SELECT grapheme_string FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1) AS temp;
SELECT substring_grapheme(gs.grapheme_string, 1, 10) FROM test_strings AS gs ORDER BY gs.id;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_strings WHERE substring_grapheme(grapheme_string, 1, 1) = 'a';
